dealershipId.title: Dealership Id
dealershipId.description: ID of the dealership. Only Use the dealership ID returned by the "Find Nearest Dealership" action. Do not ask the customer for this.

preferredDate.title: Preferred Date
preferredDate.description: Preferred test drive date (YYYY-MM-DD). The customer's preferred date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If the customer says "tomorrow" or "next Monday", calculate the actual date.

timeSlot.title: Time Slot
timeSlot.description: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening. Must be exactly "Morning", "Afternoon", or "Evening". Convert any specific time the customer mentions into the corresponding slot.
